name: Glibenclamide And Metformin HCL Tablets IP
about: Glibenclamide And Metformin HCL Tablets IP are a type of general medicine that is manufactured in India. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets and are packaged in a quantity of 20x10 tablets per box. The dosage guidelines for these tablets are as per the doctors suggestion. It is important to store these tablets in a dry and cool place to ensure their effectiveness.

faq.q: What is the purpose of Glibenclamide And Metformin HCL Tablets IP?
faq.a: Glibenclamide And Metformin HCL Tablets IP are used to treat type 2 diabetes.

faq.q: How should I take these tablets?
faq.a: You should take these tablets as per your doctors suggestion.

faq.q: Are there any side effects of taking Glibenclamide And Metformin HCL Tablets IP?
faq.a: Yes, there can be side effects such as nausea, diarrhea, and stomach upset. Please consult your doctor if you experience any side effects.

faq.q: Can I take these tablets if I have type 1 diabetes?
faq.a: No, these tablets are only used to treat type 2 diabetes.

faq.q: Can I store these tablets in a humid place?
faq.a: No, it is important to store these tablets in a dry and cool place to ensure their effectiveness.
